name: waha-tui
desc: A beautiful Terminal User Interface for WhatsApp using WAHA (WhatsApp HTTP API). Manage your WhatsApp sessions, chats, and messages directly from your terminal…
descFull: A beautiful Terminal User Interface for WhatsApp using WAHA (WhatsApp HTTP API). Manage your WhatsApp sessions, chats, and messages directly from your terminal with an intuitive TUI powered by OpenTUI.
